# bge-m3-gguf

Download model here <https://huggingface.co/gpustack/bge-m3-GGUF>

```bash
llama-server -m models/bge-m3-Q8_0.gguf --embedding -c 8192 --port 8080 --cache-type-k q8_0 --batch-size 4096 --threads 4 --temp 0.3 --top-k 30 --top-p 0.3 --repeat-penalty 1.3
```

```bash
# it's embedding model, need to send to /v1/embeddings
curl http://localhost:8080/v1/embeddings \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
    "model": "bge-m3",
    "input": "哈囉，這是一段測試文字。"
    }'
```
